title: First Greetings
description: Meet someone new at a casual gathering and exchange basics.

t1.text: Hi! I don't think we've met. I'm Sam.

templates.text: Nice to meet you, Sam. I'm Alex.

t3.text: Nice to meet you too! How are you doing tonight?

templates.text: I'm pretty good, thanks. How about you?

t5.text: Not bad! A little tired but happy to be here. So, what do you do?

templates.text: I work as a software engineer in the city.
templates.hint_zh: 我在市區當軟體工程師。

t7.text: Oh, that's cool. I'm a designer, so we probably end up arguing on the same projects.

templates.text: Ha, definitely. Where are you from originally?
templates.hint_zh: 哈,的確。你本來是哪裡人?

t9.text: I'm from Toronto, but I moved here about two years ago.

templates.text: Oh nice, do you like it here so far?
templates.hint_zh: 喔不錯,你目前喜歡這裡嗎?

t11.text: Yeah, mostly! The food scene is amazing. Anyway, I should grab a drink. Talk later?

templates.text: Sure, sounds good. Catch up with you later!
